jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Medtronic India
jsonLd.description:
Medtronic India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Agra operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Medtronic India:
Medtronic India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Medtronic India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
